name: Hastings Pier
description: Hastings Pier is a public pleasure pier in Hastings, East Sussex, England.  Built in 1872 and enjoying its prime in the 1930s, it became a popular music venue in the 1960s.  The structure suffered major storm damage in 1990, and was closed to the public for a time before closing completely in 2008, and 95% destroyed by a fire in 2010.
